dialogue: If they tracked the convoy, they know about the second base.
Then we stop behaving like a panicked crowd and start behaving like analysts.
Walls are not decoration. Each one must force Dijkstra to choose a longer cheapest path.
*the second base control room powers up, smaller and colder than the first*
Research is close to naming our attacker. Until then, every wall matters and every step of distance buys time.
End distance is the clock. Wall limit is the budget.
*sirens cut through the new base before the screens finish booting*
Spend the wall budget wisely, Agent.
